violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen and the coffee/roller grill area. Soap was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the self service food line coffee/roller grill area.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cappuccino machine not properly maintained. Power cute in cappuccino machine has heavy build up inside of dispneser and some are not properly attached causing spilage inside of machine.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Food boats near chicken hot holding noted being stored with food contact surfaces facing upward.

COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Countertop cream dispenser in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. The counter top refrigerated coffee creamer dispenser was not powered on and refrigerated creamer was being stored at ambient room temperatures.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cups and food contatiners noted being stored on the floor in kitchen and rear prep areas.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Front kitchen counter and cabinet edges noted not in good repair. Observed laminate countertops are chipping along edges exposing absorbent materials below. Cabinet drawer edges are constructed of absorbent materials that are exposed.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Soda equipment exteriors and counter below noted not clean. Observed leaks creating debris build up below soda machines.
